name: frontier-eval marks the checklist voluntary and advisory, emitting no determination or threshold
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --emit json 2>e.txt >o.json; grep -q 'voluntary=true' e.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.voluntary===true&&!("determination" in j)&&!("threshold" in j)?0:1)' && echo h16-voluntary 1>&2
